features: 1 x 3.5mm stereo jack plug to 2 x 3.5mm stereo jack sockets
Allows for conversion of 3.5mm stereo plug to two 3.5mm stereo sockets (Dual output from one signal)

Perfect connection: This 3.5mm jack headphone splitter can transfer audio from your iPhone, iPod, iPad, Samsung, MP3 players, CD players, laptops, Playstation 2, tablets to 2 output devices including headphones, speakers and more.
Crystal clear stereo sound for two listener from one device
description: From the manufacturer AV:Link| 3.5mm Jack Headphone Splitter Cable | 1.2 Metre Black Braided headphone splitter used to convert one 3.5mm audio jack into two. Connect the 3.5mm male port to your iPhone, iPod, iPad, Samsung, MP3 Players, CD Players, Laptops, Tablets or any other audio device and enable yourself to split that signal to another independent set of headphones/earphones. Discreet listening from one device to two sources. Clear Stereo sound for two listeners. PRODUCT FEATURES: 1 x 3.5mm stereo jack plug to 2 x 3.5mm stereo jack sockets Allows for conversion of 3.5mm stereo plug to two 3.5mm stereo sockets (Dual output from one signal) Perfect connection: This 3.5mm jack headphone splitter can transfer audio from your iPhone, iPod, iPad, Samsung, MP3 players, CD players, laptops, Playstation 2, tablets to 2 output devices including headphones, speakers and more. Crystal clear stereo sound for two listener from one device Simple plug in and play SPECIFICATION: Cable : diameter3.2mmØ Core diameter: 10 x 0.10mm Cable length: 2 Metres Colour: Black
